heading: Minors enlisted upon false statement of age
label: 8317 Minors enlisted upon false statement of age
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)6292(a).34 U.S.C. 900a, .Sept. 24, 1945, ch. 385, § 159 Stat. 5366292(b)(note).34 U.S.C. 900a, .Sept. 24, 1945, ch. 385, § 359 Stat. 537The word “member” is substituted for the word “person” and the words “naval service” are substituted for the words “Navy, Marine Corps, and the Reserve components thereof”. The words “form of” are added for clarity. Reference to the date “” is omitted as unnecessary. The words “is entitled to” are substituted for the words “shall be furnished” for uniformity. The decision of the Comptroller General of (B–91297), has not been overlooked. That decision, without passing on a case in which the point was involved, indicated that the transportation entitlement in might be impliedly repealed by the Career Compensation Act of 1949. The editors of the United States Code Annotated, apparently on the basis of this decision, have omitted 34 U.S.C.A. 900a from the 1954 pocket part. A conclusion that the section is repealed, however, defeats the specific purpose of the provision, which, as indicated in the legislative hearings, was to insure that underage dischargees would be transported home and not simply released at the place of discharge.September 24, 1945December 23, 194934 U.S.C. 900a
Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–232section 6292 of this title

children.label: a
children.text: The Secretary of the Navy, under regulations prescribed by him, may discharge or release from the naval service, with pay and allowances and form of discharge certificate appropriate for his service after enlistment, any enlisted member who, as the result of a false statement of age on his application for enlistment, was enlisted while under the minimum statutory or administrative age limit. A member so discharged or released is entitled to transportation in kind and subsistence from the place of discharge to his home.

children.label: b
children.text: Appropriations available for pay and allowances, subsistence, and transportation of enlisted members of the naval service are available for payments under this section.
